scripts.test: hugo build && docker run --rm --ipc=host -v $(pwd):/work -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-jammy npx playwright test
scripts.test:update: hugo build && docker run --rm --ipc=host -v $(pwd):/work -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-jammy npx playwright test --update-snapshots
